source_excerpt: The Company's total net sales decreased 3% or $11.0 billion during 2023 compared to 2022. [...] Services net sales increased 9% or $7.1 billion during 2023 compared to 2022 due to higher net sales across all lines of business.
notes: Both sub-assertions are directly supported: total net sales declined (3% / $11.0B decrease) and Services net sales grew (9% / $7.1B increase) in fiscal 2023. No caveats are stripped or figures contradicted.
